label: Record Details
description: Counterparty, source reference, and fee fields for record-only booking mode.

0.6.note: Pure synchronous input form with no async path.

0.7.note: Non-record_only mode shows informational message — clean empty/inactive state.

1.1.note: All data via useBookTradeData() — counterparty, sourceReference, fee, executionMode.

1.2.note: Pure input form — no data to filter by scope.

1.7.note: No reference data — all fields are free text inputs.

l1.notes: Pure input form. Scope changes cascade into order payload via context, not into these input fields.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Applies only when executionMode=record_only. In batch mode: widget should be disabled (no new trades being booked).

3.2.note: Pure input form — no data filtered by mode.

3.3.note: Human must verify fields are disabled or widget is hidden in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: record-only fields should behave identically (recording hypothetical off-venue trade).

4.1.note: All onChange handlers wired (setCounterparty, setSourceReference, setFee). No empty onClick.

4.3.note: Human must verify three fields (Counterparty, Source Reference, Fee) are sufficient for record-only domain function.

4.4.note: Human must verify values flow into compliance preview summary.

4.7.note: Human must verify CollapsibleSection toggle works.

4.8.note: Human must verify scroll at minW=3, minH=3.

5.1.note: Serves record-only OTC/off-venue trades across all asset classes. Primarily used for: OTC bilateral trades, block trades with specific counterparties, off-venue DeFi records.

l5.notes: Widget is mode-specific (record_only). Human walkthrough 5.2-5.6 deferred.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No hooks in widget file — all state in context.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. Smallest book widget.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-caption on all three form labels. text-[11px] → text-caption on mode-guard message.

8.3.note: Uses FormWidget, CollapsibleSection, Card, CardContent, Input from shared primitives.

8.4.note: Agent: no img, all inputs have adjacent label. No interactive divs. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human must verify at minW=3, minH=3.

l8.notes: All L8.1 violations fixed (no deferred text-[9px] in this file).

keepSeparate.rationale: Record-details fields only appear in record_only mode. Keeping separate allows users to remove this widget from their layout when not needed.

relationships.notes: Conditionally visible based on executionMode=record_only from shared context. Values feed into the compliance preview summary.

dataContract.notes: Pure form widget — no data fetching. State managed in book-data-context. Values submitted via handleSubmit in context.

gaps: No validation on counterparty field (free text, no counterparty registry lookup)
Fee field has no currency selector — assumes base currency
coverage.notes: Primarily for record-only booking mode. Asset-class-agnostic.

findings.description: book-record-details-widget.tsx — text-[10px] on Counterparty/Source Reference/Fee labels, text-[11px] on mode-guard message
findings.fix: All text-[10px] and text-[11px] replaced with text-caption (--text-caption: 0.6875rem, 11px)

findings.description: book-record-details-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings. No i18n applied.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
